interceptor.name: Wraith Interceptor
interceptor.perk: Acrobatic Hull: Grants passive +15% evasive rating. Light hull holds up to 2 active crew.

starter_miner.name: Vanguard Mining Interceptor
starter_miner.perk: Vanguard mining frame: Equipped with extra crew slots (3), a 16-slot cargo hold, and a single high-efficiency weapon lane.

starter_patrol.name: Wraith Patrol Interceptor
starter_patrol.perk: Patrol heavy frame: Reinforce titanium plating and defensive shields up to 90 SP / 110 HP.

starter_explorer.name: Wraith Long-Range Explorer
starter_explorer.perk: Long-range exploration layout: Fitted with an 80-unit fuel reservoir, a 20-slot cargo hold, and a single defensive weapon lane.

freighter.name: Atlas Superfreighter
freighter.perk: Deep Cargo Cell: Large layout slots. Supports up to 5 crew berths.

torpedoboat.name: Viper Torpedo Escort
torpedoboat.perk: Torpedo Matrix: Torpedo explosive kinetic damage +25%. Carries up to 4 crew.

assault_gunship.name: Spectre Assault Gunship
assault_gunship.perk: Combat Overdrive: Fitted weapon payloads deal +15% damage. Carries up to 6 crew.

science_explorer.name: Aegis Recon Explorer
science_explorer.perk: Advanced Radiometry: Planet scans sweep and uncover 2 extra neighboring grids instantly.

battlecruiser.name: Vindicator Command Cruiser
battlecruiser.perk: Dreadnought Battery: Fitted with 4 weapons lanes and massive crew housing up to 12 specialists.

void_leviathan.name: Tenebris Void Dreadnought
void_leviathan.perk: Fortress Shield Matrix: Titanic defensive shields recharge 20% faster; accommodates up to 15 crew members.

heavy_hauler.name: Goliath Heavy Cargo Hauler
heavy_hauler.perk: Super-Heavy Freight Cells: Massive freight arrays holding up to 60 cargo crates. Accommodates 6 crew.

mining_digger.name: Vulkan Mining Excavator
mining_digger.perk: Excavator Beam Siphon: Yields +50% extra minerals when drilling asteroid fields. Space for 4 crew.

ferry_evac.name: Odysseus Evacuation Ark
ferry_evac.perk: Passenger Habitats: Optimized for high-capacity personnel ferrying and evacuation missions. Fits up to 10 crew members.

fuel_tanker.name: Prometheus Fueling Tanker
fuel_tanker.perk: Super-Sized Fuel Cells: Houses a massive 300-unit fuel reservoir. Perfect for long-haul jumps and deep space refueling.

mining_super_rig.name: Colossus Mining Super Rig
mining_super_rig.perk: Industrial Behemoth: Massive mining capabilities and holds.
